_comments.apiKey: Required. Shared API key for all clients. Sent via x-api-key, Authorization: Bearer, x-goog-api-key, or ?key= query.
_comments.claude.command: Path or name of the claude CLI executable.
_comments.gemini.command: Path or name of the gemini CLI executable.
_comments.lmstudio.instances[*].baseUrl: OpenAI-compatible server URL. Default port for LM Studio is 1234.
_comments.ollama.useNativeApi: Default mode for all Ollama instances. true => /api/*, false => /v1/*. Per-instance useNativeApi overrides.
_comments.router.defaultBackend: Backend used when no model is supplied or model is 'auto'.
_comments.router.localProbeIntervalMs: How often local backends are re-probed to discover loaded models.
_comments.files.maxTotalBytes: Eviction kicks in when fileStore exceeds this size after TTL pass.
_comments.archive.compressionLevel: zstd level 1-22 for archived request/response bodies.
_comments.embeddings.legacyBackendUrl: Deprecated: when non-empty, bypasses the backend registry for /v1/embeddings.
_comments.adminUi.bindLocalhost: When true, admin UI rejects non-localhost requests with 403.
